---
name: Spike / Research Request
about: Time-boxed investigation to explore an approach, dependency, or design question
title: ''
labels: spike
assignees: ''
---

## Goal of the Spike

- What question are we trying to answer?
- What uncertainty needs to be reduced?

## Scope

- What will be explored during this spike?
- What is explicitly *not* included?

## Timebox

- How much time should be spent on this spike?
  (Example: 2 hours, 1 day, etc.)

## Expected Output

What artifacts should result from this spike?

Examples:

- Notes or findings
- Prototype code (not production-ready)
- Pros/cons list
- Recommendation
- Follow-up issues

## Current Thoughts / Hypotheses (optional)

Any initial ideas, assumptions, or directions worth capturing.
